description_long: This modern bungalow features a combination of white and natural wood exterior finishes, with a striking angular roofline and large glass windows. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a single-car garage with a dark roof, and a landscaped entry path flanked by greenery. The rear of the property boasts a spacious patio area, a rectangular swimming pool, and a privacy fence enclosing the backyard. The side view reveals a mix of flat and sloped roof sections, as well as a rooftop terrace with outdoor seating. The windows are generously sized and asymmetrically arranged, maximizing natural light and views. The property is surrounded by manicured lawns, shrubs, and several small trees, creating a contemporary yet inviting residential environment.
description: A modern bungalow with white and wood finishes, angular rooflines, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped yard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, privacy fence, and a glimpse of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the patio, swimming pool, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the flat roof sections, rooftop terrace, and additional yard space.
attribute_roof_type: combination of flat and shed roofs
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
